Brambles running all along the southwest edge of the walkway. Falling Fruit season: April-July.

There are wild blackerries growing all along the bank of the river. You can access them from inside the park by just going over the hill or park in the parking lot and head towards the river bank. You'll see them! Falling Fruit season: May-June.
